/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -pthread -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o joltgym_native.cpython-311-darwin.so CMakeFiles/joltgym_native.dir/module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_native.dir/bind_world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_native.dir/bind_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_native.dir/bind_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_native.dir/bind_env.cpp.o  ../mjcf/libjoltgym_mjcf.a ../renderer/libjoltgym_renderer.a ../../_deps/tinyxml2-build/libtinyxml2.a ../core/libjoltgym_core.a ../../_deps/joltphysics-build/libJolt.a ../../_deps/vk-bootstrap-build/libvk-bootstrap.a ../../libimgui.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libvulkan.dylib ../../_deps/sdl2-build/libSDL2.a -lm -Wl,-framework,CoreVideo -Wl,-framework,Cocoa -Wl,-framework,IOKit -Wl,-framework,ForceFeedback -Wl,-framework,Carbon -Wl,-framework,CoreAudio -Wl,-framework,AudioToolbox -Wl,-framework,AVFoundation -Wl,-framework,Foundation -Wl,-weak_framework,GameController -Wl,-weak_framework,Metal -Wl,-weak_framework,QuartzCore -Wl,-weak_framework,CoreHaptics
